description: Official LaTeX template for abstracts and short papers submitted to the International Workshop on Detonation for Propulsion (IWDP). Provides one-column letter-size formatting with distinct branded headers/footers for the title page versus subsequent pages, colored numbered section headings, multi-author/multi-affiliation blocks via authblk, wrapped and full-width figure support, styled tables with a custom state-notation macro, and numbered natbib citations.
